item.title: Liberals take key by-election win in seat of Nepean ahead of Victoria’s poll
item.description: ‘This is the honour of my life to be standing here.’

item.title: Home hero Jack Della Maddalena beaten to a pulp by Carlos Prates in worst loss of his UFC career
item.description: The Aussie copped a battering and limped out of the Perth main event.

item.title: Royals release rare video of Princess Charlotte on holiday to commemorate her 11th birthday
item.description: The princess had her unique sport skills on display in the footage shared by Kensington Palace.

item.title: SA to dish out on-the-spot fines for fuel breaches under new emergency powers if fuel crisis worsens
item.description: The updated legislation will also allow courts to impose imprisonment for incidents involving workers in the supply chain.

item.title: Tim Tszyu already at war with American superstar Errol Spence Jr after ‘disrespectful’ act
item.description: The Aussie has landed the highest-profile fight of his career - but his opponent hardly rates him.

item.title: Queensland tea company East Forged stuns industry, beating Coca-Cola and PepsiCo at World Food Innovation Awards
item.description: It’s success is built on an approach major companies missed.

item.title: Donald Trump assassination plots: The history of attempts on the US president’s life
item.description: Trump was most recently targeted at this year’s White House Correspondents’ Dinner.

item.title: Surviving officer's story revealed in 7NEWS podcast Dezi Freeman - The Hunt
item.description: The cop who survived being shot by Australia's most wanted man has broken his silence.

item.title: The hidden phenomenon causing Aussies to spend more on subscriptions
item.description: There are some simple ways to ensure you save more on paid services.

item.title: Australian scientists on cusp of breakthrough treatment for traumatic brain injuries
item.description: A revolutionary treatment once thought medically impossible could be just five years away.

item.title: Australia's $90 billion high-speed rail plan faces major hurdles
item.description: Experts warn the nation's toughest terrain and uncertain demand may derail the project before it even starts.

item.title: Oscar Piastri completes podium charge on last laps of Miami Grand Prix as Kimi Antonelli secures hat-trick of wins
item.description: One car flipped early and the feistiness continued all the way to the chequered flag.

item.title: ‘The last of the oil’: Fuel crisis about to get a lot worse despite Middle East war ceasefire says expert
item.description: Aussies have been warned the worst is yet to come.

item.title: Robot-delivered note saves elderly woman amid escalating strikes between Ukraine and Russia
item.description: She thought she wouldn’t make it to safety, but an unmanned vehicle turned up with a spray-painted message on its side.

item.title: Former New York City mayor and Trump lawyer Rudy Giuliani hospitalised in critical condition
item.description: Giuliani was seen coughing and struggling to speak normally in a public appearance on Friday.

item.title: Olympic Sevens star Teagan Levi set for code switch after signing with NRL club Gold Coast Titans
item.description: The 22-year-old ‘with rugby league in her DNA’ is coming home.

item.title: Prince William and Prince Harry feud: The ‘non-negotiable’ driving a rift between the royal brothers
item.description: According to the insider, it remains ‘a non-negotiable’ for William.

item.title: Gogglebox star Angie Kent shares heartbreaking news about her dad following his battle with rare blood cancer
item.description: ‘I was told there was nothing left they could do.’

item.title: At least 10 injured in shooting at lake party in Oklahoma, more victims expected
item.description: Ten partygoers were transported to hospitals ‘in various conditions’.

item.title: Incorrect spreadsheet blamed for ‘catastrophic’ Hobart Cup barrier bungle
item.description: The result of the feature race will stand despite it being run over a shorter distance.

item.title: World-first Australian trial could give obese parents weight loss drugs to tackle growing childhood crisis
item.description: Experts say more and more people will die younger than their parents unless urgent action is taken.

item.title: Two missiles reportedly hit US warship trying to pass through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: State media reports the vessel was turned back after ignoring a warning from Iran’s navy.

item.title: Middle East war live updates: Jim Chalmers says Australian economy ‘getting absolutely pummelled’ by US-Israel-Iran conflict
item.description: Follow along as we cover all the breaking news of the tenuous ceasefire holding back conflict between Iran, the United States and Israel.

item.title: Met Gala 2026: Stunning looks from fashion’s biggest event
item.description: See who nailed this year’s ‘Fashion Is Art’ dress code.

item.title: Tennis superstars blow up over $100m prize pool at French Open: ‘Deep disappointment’
item.description: The disgruntled group of players believe their demands have not been addressed.

item.title: Cameron Diaz and Benji Madden welcome third child, a son called Nautas
item.description: They have revealed the newborn’s unique name and the meaning behind it.

item.title: Footy fan with rare skin condition attacked online as Meta AI insults his appearance over innocent photo
item.description: ‘People were saying that I should be dead.’

item.title: Britney Spears pleads guilty to reckless driving in DUI case following stint in rehab facility
item.description: The pop star was arrested on a California highway last month.

item.title: Numerous cases of hantavirus identified aboard luxury cruise MV Hondius
item.description: About 150 passengers including four Australians remain trapped on board the ship after the deadly outbreak.

item.title: Tennis player Tristan Boyer attacks umpire’s chair in explosive meltdown during qualifier
item.description: The American also launched an expletive-laden tirade after the match was abruptly ended.

item.title: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni reach shock settlement before trial, two years after filming It Ends With Us
item.description: The co-stars have been locked in a bitter feud since sexual harassment claims were first made in December 2024.

item.title: One Nation Senator Pauline Hanson is considering a shock political move
item.description: ‘Don’t underestimate me, or what I may do.’

item.title: Woodford crash: Beloved nurse Carron Scott killed in head-on collision with allegedly stolen ute, man taken into custody
item.description: The driver fled the scene and was later found in a school toilet following a lockdown.

item.title: Human-to-human transmission suspected on board hantavirus luxury cruise MV Hondius, World Health Organisation says
item.description: Almost 150 people, including four Aussies, are stranded on the luxury ship.

item.title: EXPLAINER: What to know about hantavirus and its symptoms as cruise ship MV Hondius records suspected outbreak
item.description: A luxury cruise ship has recorded three deaths from a suspected outbreak.

item.title: AFL accused of ‘quick fix headline’ as big Elijah Hollands question goes unanswered
item.description: ‘No one said it wasn’t the case and they’re still not denying it.’

item.title: Middle East war: Truce in doubt as US, Iran fight for control of strait
item.description: The US is trying to force open the Strait of Hormuz while the UAE has come under attack by Iran.

item.title: Bluey birthday cake nightmare leaves Gold Coast toddler in induced coma
item.description: The toddler was rushed to hospital after a freak accident with a common ingredient.

item.title: Kane Cornes explains decision to step down from AFL All Australian panel role after Sportsbet policy change
item.description: The expert commentator has made an admission as one of his fellow panellists faces up to ‘a hypothetical’.

item.title: Dubai airport chaos as airlines suspend flights amid Iranian missile strikes on the United Arab Emirates
item.description: The escalation of conflict in the Middle East is causing major flight disruptions.

item.title: Three people evacuated from cruise ship amid hantavirus outbreak
item.description: The rare virus has killed three people on the ship and left several others ill.

item.title: Australian basketball icon Lauren Jackson appointed to new WNBL leadership position
item.description: The legend is taking the reins after the former boss was let go in a ‘genuinely disappointing’ saga.

item.title: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka flags shock grand slam boycott over prize money: ‘Only way’
item.description: ‘Without us there wouldn’t be a tournament and there wouldn’t be that entertainment.’

item.title: Government confirms ISIS brides returning to Australia from Syria
item.description: Home Affairs Minister Tony Burke provided the update on Wednesday.

item.title: Kate Middleton: Princess of Wales gears up for first overseas trip since cancer treatment
item.description: The Princess of Wales is gearing up for an international trip which will mark her first overseas visit since undergoing cancer treatment.

item.title: Aussie Cam Smith addresses retirement rumours amid LIV Golf’s uncertain future
item.description: The superstar golfer has been given ‘every assurance’ the league will continue beyond this year.

item.title: Injured Panthers star Liam Martin addresses State of Origin hopes
item.description: The NSW veteran is still weeks away from a return to the field.

item.title: Madeleine McCann: British police push to extradite Christian Bruckner to UK in connection with girl’s disappearance
item.description: The development comes as the 20-year anniversary of the three-year-old’s disappearance approaches.

item.title: FedEx driver sentenced to death for murder of seven-year-old Athena Strand in Texas
item.description: The 34-year-old delivered a Christmas present to the girl’s house the day she went missing.

item.title: Former Queensland premier Annastacia Palaszczuk cancels book tour appearances after partner Reza Adib charged
item.description: One event was scrapped over ‘unforeseen circumstances’, while another has been quietly postponed.

item.title: Federal budget 2026: Albanese government announces $10 billion fuel and fertiliser security plan to be included in budget
item.description: It comes as the government was forced to make changes to Australia’s fuel supply amid the ongoing war in the Middle East.

item.title: Storm star Jahrome Hughes opens up on Craig Bellamy ‘sacrifice’ since diagnosis
item.description: One of the champion coach’s long-term veterans says he has a new outlook on their relationship.

item.title: The Agenda Setters Stocks after R8: Buy, hold and sell
item.description: ‘He didn’t actually understand what to do.’

item.title: Adelaide 36ers coach Mike Wells quits one week after signing contract extension
item.description: The American has almost immediately backflipped on his decision and is heading home with a ‘heavy heart’.

item.title: Jane Bunn breaks down wintry conditions set to hit Victoria by Wednesday evening
item.description: A band of rain is developing and this one comes with a punch of bitterly cold air and potential hail.

item.title: Craig Foster slams Fed Square’s ‘ridiculous’ decision to not show Socceroos matches at World Cup
item.description: ‘All stakeholders should be working to overturn this absurd decision.’

item.title: Bondi Royal Commission: Man charged after wearing swastika T-shirt outside antisemitism hearing
item.description: The man insisted he had no idea the antisemitism inquiry was taking place.

item.title: Shocking data reveals taxis sent instead of ambulances to triple-0 calls in Tasmania
item.description: New data has exposed how seriously ill patients in one state are being transported to hospital.

item.title: Robert Irwin spills on his embarrassing blunder while dining with King Charles for lunch
item.description: The multi-talented animal conservationist is almost perfect, but he’d want his time again after this regrettable act.

item.title: Gold Coast parents issue urgent warning after toddler became unresponsive from inhaling metallic cake decorating powder
item.description: ‘His eyes were rolling in his head and he couldn’t breathe properly.’

item.title: Staff suspended over welfare fears before Kumanjayi Little Baby’s death in Alice Springs
item.description: Multiple welfare reports were raised about the five-year-old girl before her alleged murder.

item.title: Jack Purcell Meats collapses amid mounting pressure on family food businesses
item.description: The business grew into a juggernaut of more than 20 stores before mounting pressure and court action brought it undone.

item.title: Mirvac launches landmark trial building modular homes in record time
item.description: But there's a catch that could make buyers think twice about this construction method.

item.title: Footage captures captain of hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius telling passengers about death onboard
item.description: Passengers and crew appear unaware a crisis is unfolding onboard in the footage.

item.description: The limited-edition coins are already being resold for eye-watering prices online.

item.description: The explosive confrontation was caught on camera.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Jeffrey Epstein’s purported suicide note released; two charged after fatal car plunge
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Billionaire CNN founder Ted Turner dies aged 87
item.description: The outspoken TV pioneer was also renowned for his humanitarian work and 10-year marriage to Jane Fonda.

item.title: Nikita Tszyu takes down tough Spaniard Oscar Diaz during super-welterweight fight
item.description: The Aussie had to quickly apologies but his rival’s team was ‘very unhappy’.

item.title: Hyundai Ioniq V a possibility for Australia
item.description: The Hyundai Ioniq V revealed in Beijing may not be a China-exclusive model, with the company studying sales in Australia, Asia and elsewhere.

item.title: Middle East war: Peace hopes revived as Iran reviews new US proposal to end conflict
item.description: Donald Trump issued a stark warning amid a stalemate over the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Pat Cummins leads Hyderabad Sunrisers to victory as Cooper Connolly joins IPL ton elite
item.description: ‘This is why Pat Cummins stands among the greatest leaders in cricket.’

item.title: New details as lawyer says David Warner accepts driving after wine with friends was ‘reckless, foolish’
item.description: The 11-minute timeline between the Aussie cricket great’s last drink and police stop has been revealed in court.

item.title: Mary Fowler crowned Women’s Super League champion as fellow Matildas suffer heartbreak
item.description: The superstar has officially ended Sam Kerr’s reign as champion after one Aussie ended the dreams of three more.

item.title: First electric BMW M3 won’t cost a lot more than the petrol version – report
item.description: BMW M’s sales chief says the quad-motor, 1000hp sports sedan will be priced “in the same ballpark” as the next combustion-powered M3.

item.title: Jacinta Allan steps in to overturn Fed Square’s Socceroos ban ahead of 2026 World Cup
item.description: The Victorian premier has vowed not to let ‘a few d***heads’ ruin the World Cup for everyone.

item.title: Nick Riewoldt’s Carlton rebuild plan that has Patrick Cripps heading west and Harley Reid on the move
item.description: ‘All of a sudden you’ve built your next premiership midfield.’

item.title: Major data breach as private information of Australian students and teachers leaked
item.description: ‘This incident has impacted thousands of educational institutions.’

item.title: Did the PNG Chiefs’ latest PR stunt lean into their biggest concern?
item.description: Questions still linger after one glaring omission from the NRL expansion club’s charm offensive.

item.title: Woolworths brings back soft plastics recycling
item.description: Collection points will be available in 700 stores across five states.

item.title: Passenger killed in sinking car identified as young Western Sydney cricketer Mohammad Kashif
item.description: ‘His sudden passing has left a deep void, both emotionally and financially.’

item.title: Richmond great Alex Rance raises eyebrows after revealing a dislike for beating AFL opponents
item.description: ‘I’m struggling to make sense of it.’

item.title: Craig McRae fires up with impassioned defence of Pies’ Scott Pendlebury plan as record-breaking game nears
item.description: The Collingwood coach is defiant but acknowledges his ‘least selfish’ player is struggling with the criticism.

item.title: 2027 Omoda 4 small SUV to take on Toyota Corolla Cross, Hyundai Kona in Australia
item.description: The new Omoda 4 small SUV is due in Australia next year, targeting young buyers with sharp pricing and bold styling.

item.title: Footage emerges after victim kidnapped at gunpoint outside Bass Hill home in Sydney’s southwest
item.description: CCTV cameras have captured the moment three men ambush a ute driver outside a suburban home.

item.title: Australian Government pledges to secure more fuel as part of $10 billion investment
item.description: Billions of dollars have been earmarked for the new Australian Fuel Security Reserve to increase domestic fuel supply amid shortages and price spikes.

item.title: Zeekr won't take on Tesla Model 3 with EV sedan in Australia
item.description: China's Zeekr isn't looking to bring the sedan-bodied 007 to Australia to take on the popular Tesla Model 3, instead mulling its 001 shooting brake.

item.title: Woodford aged care nurse Carron Scott killed on way to work in alleged stolen ute crash remembered
item.description: Carron and her husband had just celebrated their 21st wedding anniversary.

item.title: Three seriously injured as helicopter ditches into water off Horn Island
item.description: One passenger had to swim underwater to get out of the aircraft.

item.title: Struggling defender Ben McKay dropped for Essendon’s clash with GWS Giants
item.description: The debate around Ben McKay has been intense and now he’s been dumped from the team.

item.title: Adelaide Crows mourning death of Irish star Mark Keane’s brother Vinny
item.description: The Crows are rallying around another much-loved teammate following a family tragedy.

item.title: US tourist John Rudat returns to Dresden court after box cutter slashes left permanent scars while defending woman on tram
item.description: The tourist intervened when a young woman was being allegedly assaulted on a tram in Germany.

item.title: GWM pushing ahead with major Australian engineering hub following sale of ex-Holden proving ground
item.description: GWM says it's disappointed by the sale of Lang Lang, but it's working to open a new tech centre by the end of this year.

item.title: South Australia snares Australian Open golf tournament but LIV Golf questions linger
item.description: Premier Peter Malinauskas has secured another sporting event as he admits he is ‘not naive’ to fears over LIV Golf’s future.

item.title: Woman, child injured during hours-long alleged attack in Queensland
item.description: The man is due to face court on Thursday.

item.title: Souths confirm Latrell Mitchell back injury weeks out from State of Origin opener
item.description: The superstar faces the prospect of not playing at all before the series opener at the end of the month.

item.title: Brisbane hoon blitz sees eight arrested and two Ford Falcons seized after dangerous Gateway Bridge incident
item.description: Dozens of fines have been issued and cars seized in Queensland as police make a vow.

item.title: Much-loved jockey Braidon Small claims fairytale win on Instigator in Grand Annual Steeplechase
item.description: The inspirational hero won by the narrowest of margins in Australia’s most gruelling race.

item.title: Greyhound bus driver found not guilty over horror Queensland crash killing three on Bruce Highway near Gumlu
item.description: A Queenslander and two German tourists died when the bus collided with a 4WD towing a caravan.
